games.description: Put your observation skills to the test in Find 6 Differences, a fun and relaxing puzzle game! Hint system to help you when youre stuck. Think you have a sharp eye? Play Find 6 Differences now and prove your skills!
games.instructions: Tap on the images to play this game

games.name: Turkish draughts
games.description: The main feature is that moves and captures with checkers are made horizontally and vertically, and not diagonally, as in most popular types of checkers. Accordingly, the initial arrangement of checkers is different. On a 64-cell board, opponents place their 16 checkers on all cells of the second and third horizontals. You can play the game with artificial intelligence, with another person on one device, or with an opponent online in multiplayer mode. You can also watch other players play, act as a spectator, or suggest your own version of the next move to the player by making it on the board.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Sunny Fields
games.description: Welcome to a vibrant farming adventure! Build and expand your own farm by purchasing animals and structures. Produce goods like milk and eggs with cows and chickens, then pack and sell them to earn coins. Test your skills by completing matching levels or by efficiently packaging products. Beware of spoiled items &amp;ndash; discard them for bonuses or risk losing gold. Exchange collected goods for coins and climb the competitive leaderboards, tracking your wealth. Upgrade your farm, unlock new animals, and become the top producer. The more you play, the more you grow! Dive into this relaxing farm journey, earn rewards, and see how high you can rise!
games.instructions: Match cards to earn coins and unlock rewards Pack milk and eggs into boxes to maximize space and profit Build your farm by buying cows chickens and pets Upgrade buildings to boost production Compete in leaderboards by earning the most gold and produ

games.name: One2One
games.description: Tap numbers or letters on the grid in ascending order (1&amp;rarr;2&amp;rarr;3&amp;hellip; or A&amp;rarr;B&amp;rarr;C&amp;hellip;) as quickly as possible. Choose a grid size and mode (numbers or letters). Start the timer, then tap tiles sequentially. Correct taps turn green and lock; wrong taps flash red. The timer stops when the last tile is tapped, displaying your completion time. Challenge yourself to beat your best record! This game trains focus, visual perception, and cognitive agility, making it perfect for brain training. Practice daily to improve speed and concentration. Enjoy the challenge!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: The Grid
games.description: The Grid is a fast paced puzzle game where the players are required to repeat the pattern shown in the Grid. The players have only a few seconds to repeat the correct pattern in order to advance further. The challenges become more and more difficult as you progress and some may need to change your perspective as well. Try to score as much as you can before the time runs out and then try again to beat your high score or be at the top of the leaderboard. The grid is also mobile friendly which only requires click / tap controls.
games.instructions: Mouse click Touch Tap
